feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Loving Sin
entry.summary:
Author: Warlock_Nerd

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,439Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 58

Summary: While in Texas, Christopher had moved into his dad’s childhood bedroom and one night when he couldn’t sleep, he decided to go through the taped up old boxes he found in the closet. In there he finds something that makes him want to run away. He found a journal. His dad’s journal from when he was sixteen. And from reading it, Christopher found out his dad was sent to a conversion camp when he was caught kissing a boy by his parents. Panicked and scared, Christopher calls Buck, demanding him to come get him. TW - Homophobia, Homophobic language, Conversion camp/therapy, Repressed memories, Abusive Helena and Ramon Diaz, Child Abuse references, Religious abuse and Catholic guilt.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Buck's silent struggle
entry.summary:
Author: broncho1000

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,500Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 98

Summary: After a dangerous rescue, tensions at the 118 remain high following Buck’s lawsuit, leaving him more isolated than ever.While the team struggles with unresolved anger and distance, something begins to feel off—but no one notices the warning signs in time.When an unexpected discovery turns everything upside down, guilt, fear, and old emotions rise to the surface.As the team is forced to confront the consequences of pushing Buck away, Eddie finds himself facing the terrifying possibility that some mistakes can’t be undone.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

  • Maddie Buckley/Howie "Chimney" Han

entry.title: 100 miles from my home
entry.summary:
Author: Lyla_Nostra

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,426Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 44

Summary: Buck saved fifteen people before the pacific claimed him. Four days later, he was declared dead. A week later, they buried an empty casket. But Evan Buckley has always been a fighter, and he isn’t done yet.While Eddie struggles to raise Christopher without their anchor, Buck begins a grueling journey back from the dead.Because there is nothing in this world that could stop Buck from coming back to his family.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Echo of My Own Name
entry.summary:
Author: Alex_Barbossa

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,123Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 19

Summary: It was cold and dark. It was very scary. A voice kept calling his name over and over. It kept him awake. Was he in water? Yes. Very cold water. Ice-cold water. He remembered a splash, an agonizing cold that made his muscles freeze. His lungs refused to work because of the cold. He also remembered deep brown eyes filled with horrified fear a second before he lost consciousness.

entry.title: You are my home
entry.summary:
Author: Enti13666

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 93,622Chapters: 29/?Kudos: 857

Summary: When Christopher calls his grandparents after seeing his father with a copy of his mother, he was hoping for a few weeks of peace in El Paso. What he didn't expect was for his grandparents to sue his father for custody. When his father clearly doesn't want him and doesn't show up in court, Chris does the only thing he can. He calls his Buck. Buck has never let him down before. -------- In short, like one phone call brings chaos, unnamed feelings and old trauma to the life of the Buckey-Diaz family.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Your Heart’s a Bird Without the Wings to Fly
entry.summary:
Author: catniss_37

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,682Chapters: 10/20Kudos: 108

Summary: "Buck!" Eddies voice rang through the space, abruptly cut off by the deafening sound of crumpling concrete hitting the ground. Eddie stared at the rubble now blocking the way between himself and Buck. "Buck," Eddie whimpered as he dropped to his knees in front of the pile of rubble Buck was buried under. OR If episode 9x3 actually included the subway collapse from the promo, because I'm so mad about that.Continuing the story using that as a plot point. It will be canon divergent from that point onward in season 9, episode 3.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Fire and the Flood
entry.summary:
Author: TentativeTreason

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,411Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 580

Summary: Buck finds a Home at the 118 after leaving Camp Half-Blood. **** (i.e. How the cult misunderstandings began, and other accompanying drabbles, What-ifs, episode-based chapters, AUs and outsider POVs that I can think of. Not chronological, includes both pre and post demi-god reveal.) ****Part of a series Hearth and Home. Mostly canon-compliant. Can be read as a standalone or part of the series.

entry.title: the red means I love you
entry.summary:
Author: lintcollector

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,877Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 9

Summary: A phone buzzed. It certainly wasn't Buck's, tucked in his uniform pants pocket, which meant... yep, Eddie had left his phone in here. The phone vibrated again, which allowed him to casually happen to glance over at the notification banner. TableSaver: Thank you for using TableSaver! El Gañoso — Table for 2 on... A reservation already? That was fast, almost as if Bobby himself was eager for Eddie to go on this... well, it was probably a date, given the whole romantic candlelight dinner at a high end establishment. Nausea crashed into Buck with the force of a tsunami. — Or: Buck finds out Eddie has an upcoming date, and consequently spirals. There's also a lot of cooking involved.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: May This Journey Lead You Starward, and All The Way Home: A 9-1-1/Honkai Star Rail crossover
entry.summary:
Author: WTFDavey730

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,114Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 109

Summary: The aftermath of the lawsuit was brutal on everyone, and everyone involved was hurt one way or another. So for the past few weeks, Buck kept a low profile when he came back, kept everything on a subdued level, as to not step on anyone's toes. Weeks turned into a month, then it became months. Buck tried bridging the gap, tried every type of olive branch, but no one would take it. Hen was at least polite when she declined; Chimney would scoff at him, Eddie ignored him, and Bobby kept their relationship purely professional. But one night changed everything.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: May Not Be Educated in Agriculture But I'm Definitely Fluent in Buckculture
entry.summary:
Author: Dark_Phantom248

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,024Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 3

Summary: Buck was cooking dinner and rambling on about whatever, like normal. Eddie was sitting on the counter and admiring Buck as he did so, also normal. Buck recently went on a deep dive into agriculture, and he was super excited to tell Eddie about it. “Okay, okay,” Buck said as he started rolling out the dough for the pizza he was making. “Did you know that there are different names for the same animal based on their age, maturity, and whether they’ve been neutered or not?” “No, I did not,” Eddie said cheerfully, matching Buck’s energy as he watched his forearms flex while he held down on the rolling pin–God, Eddie needed those arms around him now. He put that thought to the side as he inquired. “Do you have some examples?” OR Buck educates Eddie on Agricultural topics, and Eddie listens--he's really just here for the view he gets.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: second (third) hand news
entry.summary:
Author: Frawg_Spawn

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,606Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 454

Summary: "I don't think Eddie knows how to ride a horse."As far as Buck is aware, his best friend is not harbouring secret equestrian tendencies."Yes, he does," Theo insists stubbornly, looking personally offended at Buck's disagreement. "He rode a horse in the desert."Buck blinks."Chris told me."~or, Eddie tells Chris he rode a horse in New Mexico, Chris tells Theo, Theo tells Buck. Some revelations are made.

entry.title: You Are Not Alone, Believe Me
entry.summary:
Author: afternooncupoftea

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,294Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 186

Summary: “Okay, um, what else? Obviously, there’s more information because you wouldn’t be telling me this. Can you please just—” The lawyer nods. “Daniela had two daughters, twins, born May 10th 2015. Alena and Adela Buckley.”“I—you—what? You’re saying that I have two daughters?”OrBuck gets the unexpected news that he’s a father to two twin girls and the lawyer may or may not think that Buck and Eddie are in a relationship.

entry.title: just play it like it lays
entry.summary:
Author: dogfishmonger

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,406Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 60

Summary: Google told him this isn’t deadly—not unless he does something stupid like not drink any water and let himself die of dehydration or whatever—but he thinks it might kill him anyway. When he was headed into work, it was bad. Six hours into the shift, he didn’t think it would possibly get any worse. It did. It got worse eighteen hours ago, twelve hours ago, two hours ago. And it’ll be worse tomorrow, and somehow, impossibly, it won’t kill him. It feels like it should be killing him.—OR: Buck spends some time on medication assisted treatment. Various people hang out. He watches a shit ton of Planet Earth.—Title from The Mountain Goats' "The Alphonse Mambo".

entry.title: you're an angel (i'm a dog)
entry.summary:
Author: squishymar

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,038Chapters: 4/8Kudos: 19

Summary: He was something from the very beginning. Buck was loud. He was pouty. He was annoyingly stubborn. He was competitive in a way that made Eddie pause. Buck was nothing like anyone kept telling Eddie he was like. So when he risked his life in that ambulance. And Eddie told him he could have his back, he watched his face shift. His eyes softened in a way that felt familiar. Like he’s seen those eyes before. Like he's been waiting for someone to look at him like that. All Eddie could think was. Oh. I like you. _________ or Eddie and Buck realize they have more time :)

entry.title: Take My Hand (You'll Like It)
entry.summary:
Author: sn4keb1tes

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,860Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 126

Summary: Somewhere between watching them leave and contemplating on the ridiculousness of his situation with Mr. and Mrs. Williams, Buck willed himself to walk out of the station. He didn't really remember how he got to his car, all he knew was that his hand was on the handle to open the door. He was about to get in when Eddie came up behind him and said, “You're coming over.” “Are you asking me or telling me?” “Telling, follow me home.” Buck's very rarely, if ever, been one to tell Eddie no so he did what Eddie told him to, he followed him home. He'd follow Eddie into an active volcano, following him to 4995 South Bedford was nothing.Or: Buck and Eddie are in love with each other, their souls have known it since they met each other, their minds, however, take a while to catch up. Or: Eight year long situationship turns into an eleven year long situationship after very ill advised sex.

entry.title: the bedtime initiative
entry.summary:
Author: drunkonyou

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,909Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 347

Summary: Theo plops himself onto the closed toilet seat, drowning in his Spider-Man robe while Eddie blow-dries his hair. He leans his face into Eddie’s stomach, humming to himself and fiddling with one of his bath toys that he’d rescued before being plucked from the water. The tub slowly drains, the bathroom is humid and nice-smelling, and there’s the weight of a toddler against him. Eddie isn’t just falling asleep, he can feel the stress of the day melting away.He sighs. Theo tips his chin to look at him and sighs back, flaring his nostrils like they’re two tigers communicating in chuffs.“I’m happy that you’re here, Eddie.”“Yeah,” Eddie says. He aims the blow dryer down the back of Theo’s robe, making him giggle. “Me too, kiddo.”or, Buck needs some help putting Theo to bed. Eddie has his back.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Eight Years of Almost (And The Year it Finally Stuck)
entry.summary:
Author: Writeninembers

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,446Chapters: 6/9Kudos: 86

Summary: It starts as a mistake. A joke. Something that doesn’t mean anything. Eddie’s birthday ends.A midnight kiss.Buck’s birthday begins. They do it every year.Over.And over.And over. For nine years.Every year.The same person. Some years are easy.Some are messy.And some… shouldn’t have happened.

entry.title: On the Record
entry.summary:
Author: ScribblesAfterDark

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,629Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 173

Summary: Time seemed to stretch, the world narrowing into a pinpoint. There she was. Shock hit him first. She looked different. Hair scraped back in a messy bun, face pale and tired, dark circles bruising her eyes.…it all triggered memories he had tried so hard to lock away. The fight, the betrayal, the night she’d outed him…he hadn’t even let himself think about her for two years. And now, here she was, holding a baby cradled in her arms. Eddie’s breath caught. His hands slackened at his sides. The air felt thick, heavy, impossible to move through. He could barely process the sight of her, the sound of her voice, the soft whimper of the child. “Shannon?” His voice came out rough. “What…what are you doing here?” Her eyes met his, tired and full of something that looked a lot like guilt. “Hey, Eddie,” she said softly. “We need to talk.” Or, Eddie Díaz finally has everything under control…his career, his relationship…but when his past shows up on his doorstep holding a baby and a thousand unanswered questions. Between the tabloids, the team, and Buck’s new life at the 118, holding it all together might be Eddie’s toughest game yet.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: family; handmade
entry.summary:
Author: goforeddie

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,134Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 34

Summary: by the time he turned 35, still single and child-free, Buck had accepted that it would most likely be his reality. He wouldn’t get what he wanted, not traditionally, but he could find comfort in a platonic partnership with Eddie and in being involved in the raising of his child. There would be no picket white fence and golden retriever, sure, but Buck wouldn’t exchange either of the Diaz boys for anything in the world, certainly not for pieces of wood and a quadrupedal animal. The choice was easy! Then, Theo came into his life. Or, more accurately, Theo reappeared in his life.
